description: Use this API to replicate system conditions of a contingency case solution, as contained in a designated Saved Case File, in the form of a Contingency Solution Output File. Results may be appended to an existing Contingency Solution Output File, or an new Contingency Solution Output File may be created. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.0.0. ierr = append_accc(option, dfxfile, basfile, cntfile, accfile, label, numdesc, descrpt)
python_syntax: ierr = append_accc(option, dfxfile, basfile, cntfile, accfile, label, numdesc, descrpt)

parameters.name: dfxfile
parameters.description: Name of the distribution factor data file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: basfile
parameters.description: Name of the saved case file containing the pre-contingency power flow working case. this is the case that was present when the distribution factor data file specified in dfxfile was constructed; it is also the case from which the contingency case was formed. its solution is in the saved case file specified in cntfile. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: cntfile
parameters.description: Name of the saved case file containing the contingency case solution for which results are to be placed in the contingency solution output file specified in accfile. this case must be formed by imposing status and/or boundary condition changes on the pre-contingency case specified in basfile, and then solving using one or more of the power flow solution activities. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: accfile
parameters.description: Name of the contingency solution output file. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: label
parameters.description: 12 character contingency label. (input; blank by default).

parameters.name: numdesc
parameters.description: Number of lines of text used to describe the contingency case; must be between 1 and 16. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: descrpt
parameters.description: An array of NUMDESC elements specifying Are NUMDESC lines of text describing the contingency case. (input; blank by default).

option.description: create a new Contingency Solution Output File in the file specified in ACCFILE.
append results to the existing Contingency Solution Output File specified in ACCFILE.

error_codes.description: buses in island(s) without a swing bus; use activity TREE.
